name: Line Chart
description: Shows trends over time with connected data points along a continuous axis
use_case: Time-series data stock prices website traffic over time

name: Bar Chart
description: Compares quantities across discrete categories using rectangular bars
use_case: Sales by region product comparison monthly revenue

name: Area Chart
description: Line chart with shaded area below showing cumulative or stacked values
use_case: Cumulative revenue user growth stacked metrics

name: Pie Chart
description: Shows proportional parts of a whole as slices of a circle
use_case: Market share budget allocation category distribution

name: Donut Chart
description: Pie chart variant with hollow center allowing additional metric display
use_case: KPI rings with center metric portfolio allocation

name: Scatter Plot
description: Displays correlation between two numeric variables as individual points
use_case: Feature correlation anomaly detection A/B results

name: Bubble Chart
description: Scatter plot with third dimension encoded as bubble size
use_case: Market sizing portfolio analysis multi-dimensional comparison

name: Heatmap
description: Uses color intensity in a matrix to show data density and patterns
use_case: User behavior calendar activity code review frequency

name: Treemap
description: Hierarchical data visualized as nested rectangles sized by value
use_case: File system visualization market cap by sector

name: Sankey Diagram
description: Flow diagram showing quantities moving between nodes
use_case: User journey funnel energy flows budget allocation

name: Funnel Chart
description: Sequential stages showing drop-off at each conversion point
use_case: Sales pipeline conversion rates onboarding flow

name: Waterfall Chart
description: Shows cumulative effect of sequential positive and negative values
use_case: Profit-and-loss bridge financial variance analysis

name: Candlestick Chart
description: Financial chart showing open high low and close prices over time
use_case: Stock prices cryptocurrency OHLC trading data

name: Gantt Chart
description: Horizontal bar chart showing project schedule and task dependencies
use_case: Project planning sprint timelines resource scheduling

name: Radar Chart
description: Spider web chart comparing multiple variables across multiple entities
use_case: Performance comparison skills assessment athlete stats

name: Gauge Chart
description: Speedometer-style display of a single metric against a target range
use_case: KPI progress score indicators health metrics

name: Network Graph
description: Nodes and edges visualizing relationships between entities
use_case: Social connections dependency maps knowledge graphs

name: Box Plot
description: Shows statistical distribution quartiles and outliers in datasets
use_case: Statistical analysis A/B test results distribution

name: Histogram
description: Bar chart showing frequency distribution of continuous data
use_case: Response time distribution age demographics

name: Chord Diagram
description: Circular diagram showing interrelationships between multiple groups
use_case: Migration flows cross-category relationships

name: Stream Graph
description: Stacked area chart with smooth curves flowing around a central axis
use_case: Topic trends over time genre popularity streams

name: Calendar Heatmap
description: GitHub-style activity heatmap arranged by day week and month
use_case: Contribution history activity tracking daily patterns

name: Sunburst Chart
description: Radial treemap showing hierarchical data in concentric rings
use_case: Disk usage website category breakdown org hierarchy

name: Parallel Coordinates
description: Multiple vertical axes with lines showing multi-variable relationships
use_case: Multi-dimensional analysis feature comparison

name: Violin Plot
description: Combines box plot with density estimation showing distribution shape
use_case: Sample distribution comparison statistical analysis
